creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Thanks for the screenshot, what's pictured is in the summary line of bug 265352. 

A gentle hint, for the future: at the head of the FreshPorts page for a port, the second of the two bug icons can be used to make a bug report that will be correctly assigned from the outset. 

The port, in this case, is: 

    sysutils/plasma5-discover

----

% pkg provides /usr/local/bin/plasma-discover
Name    : plasma5-discover-5.27.8_1
Comment : Plasma5 package management tools
Repo    : FreeBSD
Filename: usr/local/bin/plasma-discover-update
          usr/local/bin/plasma-discover
% pkg query %o plasma5-discover
sysutils/plasma5-discover
%

*** This bug has been marked as a duplicate of bug 265352 ***
